vpn: Please restart the VPN client and try reconnecting. Did that resolve it?
Check that your internet connection is stable by loading a webpage, then try the VPN again. Is it connecting now?
Try disabling and re-enabling your network adapter in Device Manager, then reconnect to the VPN. Any luck?
email: Please sign out of Outlook and sign back in. Does that resolve the sync issue?
Open Windows Credential Manager and clear any saved Office or Outlook credentials, then relaunch Outlook. Is it syncing now?
Try removing and re-adding your email account under Outlook Account Settings. Did that fix it?
login: Please double-check your username and password, and make sure Caps Lock is off. Can you log in now?
Try resetting your password through the self-service portal or IT reset link. Were you able to get in?
If your account appears locked, wait five minutes and try again. Is the login working now?
network: Please restart your router or modem by unplugging it for thirty seconds, then plugging it back in. Is your connection restored?
Check whether other devices on the same network can access the internet. Is this affecting only your machine?
Run the Windows network diagnostic by right-clicking your network icon and selecting Troubleshoot. Did that find and fix anything?
software: Please close the application completely and reopen it. Is it working now?
Check for available software updates and install them, then restart the app. Did that help?
Try uninstalling and reinstalling the application. Is it running correctly now?
hardware: Please restart the device and check if the issue persists. Is it working after the restart?
Check all cable connections and make sure everything is firmly seated. Did that resolve it?
If possible, test the device on another computer to rule out a port issue. Does it work on the other machine?
other: Could you describe the issue in a bit more detail so I can point you in the right direction?
Let me try a general fix — please restart your computer and see if the issue clears. Did a restart help?
I'll need to escalate this one to get you the right specialist. Let me create a ticket for you.
